nasb.text: Do you become a king because you are competing in cedar? Did not your father eat and drink And do justice and righteousness? Then it was well with him.

esv.text: Do you think you are a king because you compete in cedar? Did not your father eat and drink and do justice and righteousness? Then it was well with him.

cnv.text: 難道你是用香柏木爭勝來表明王的身分嗎？ 你父親不是也吃也喝， 也施行公正和公義嗎？ 那時他得享福樂。

ccb.text: 难道你大肆使用香柏木就能显出你做王的气派吗？ 你父亲也吃也喝， 但他秉公行义， 所以他凡事顺利；
